metadata.name: Analyze Social Media Sentiment for a New Show

description: Following the premiere of a new series, an agent must analyze social media sentiment to gauge audience reaction.

nodes.task_description: Gather all social media posts mentioning the new show from the last 24 hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a dataset of thousands of posts from Twitter, Instagram, and Reddit.

nodes.task_description: Run a sentiment analysis model on the collected data.

expected_outcome.value: The model classifies sentiment as 65% positive, 20% neutral, and 15% negative.

nodes.task_description: Identify the main topics of conversation within the positive and negative posts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that viewers love the lead actor but dislike a major plot twist.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report of the findings for the marketing and production teams.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a concise report highlighting key audience reactions.
